title: ilex curtissii
intro: Ilex curtissii, also known as the California holly or mountain holly, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's leaves and berries have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Ilex curtissii have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and supporting the immune system. Ilex curtissii is often used in herbal preparations including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves and berries in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
